_comment: Single source of truth for Plan Forge statistics cited across the docs. Update this first, then run scripts/check-metrics.ps1 (or .sh) to find any surface that still shows stale numbers. DO NOT template-inject this file into HTML — the goal is detection, not generation. Bump values here whenever a release changes them.

mcpTools._breakdownNote: Per-family breakdown is no longer maintained here — it drifted badly between v2.63 and v3.20. The authoritative source is pforge-mcp/tools.json (one entry per MCP tool), surfaced in docs/capabilities.md by scripts/generate-capabilities-doc.mjs.

dashboardTabsBreakdown: Forge: Home, Runs, Progress, Crucible, Governance, Cost, Actions, Replay, Extensions, Config, Traces, Skills, Watcher, Tempering, Bug Registry, Memory, Timeline, Review, Inner Loop, Forge-Master (20) + LiveGuard: Health, Incidents, Triage, Security, Env (5)

_knownStaleAliases._comment: Numbers that appeared in prior versions as current-state claims and should NEVER appear in current docs. The checker flags any of these found outside of CHANGELOG.md, /memories/, and docs/V3-CAPABILITY-AUDIT.md (excluded because that doc intentionally mentions old values for forensic purposes). Do NOT add version strings here that are also used as 'feature shipped at vX' annotations throughout the manual — the regex matcher can't distinguish historical badges from current-version claims.
